hero.subtitle: We build ecommerce systems that convert traffic into sales — from landing page design and SEO to checkout optimization and data analytics.

details.title: What We Do & Why It Matters
details.card1Desc: Most ecommerce sites attract traffic that never buys. Wrong audiences, unclear messaging, poor UX, and no attribution — money is leaking at every stage of the funnel.
details.card2Desc: End-to-end ecommerce optimization: web design, SEO, landing pages, and conversion rate optimization working as one connected system aimed at revenue.
details.card3Desc: Higher conversion rate, lower acquisition cost, and revenue you can trace directly to specific channels, campaigns, and pages.

subFeatures.title: Every Deliverable,
subFeatures.item1Desc: Conversion-focused store design built around how your customers actually shop, from homepage to checkout.
subFeatures.item2Desc: Rank for high-intent product and category searches that bring in purchase-ready traffic.
subFeatures.item3Desc: Purpose-built pages for campaigns, product launches, and seasonal promotions that maximize ad spend returns.
subFeatures.item4Desc: Systematic testing and refinement of every funnel stage to reduce drop-off and increase completed purchases.
subFeatures.item5Desc: Know exactly which channels, ads, and pages are generating revenue — no more guessing where to invest.
subFeatures.item6Desc: Identify and remove friction points across the entire shopping experience that are silently costing you sales.

caseStudy.title: Real Results for Real Businesses
caseStudy.case1Problem: The store had steady traffic but a conversion rate below 0.8%. Customers were browsing but not buying — unclear product pages, a confusing checkout, and no retargeting.
caseStudy.case2Problem: Almost no organic presence. The brand was 100% reliant on paid ads with rising CPAs and no long-term channel building in place.
